rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JANG 1991 TRUST (DATED 4/11/91) TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Under Probate Code 17200: Objections To Account, Petition For Immediate Preliminary Distribution, Petition To Remove Trustee For Conflict Of Interest, Petition Under Probate Code 850 To Determine Ownership Of Bank Accounts, And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/6/20. No courtesy copy of the late filed "Declaration" purportedly just supplementing the petition caption. Notice with a copy of the supplement must be served. [CRC 7.53(b).] The notice must clearly set forth the full caption of the pleadings to be heard and disclose the amount of any surcharge. [Prob. C. Sect. 851(c)(2).] A proposed order cannot be "supplemented" by a filed pleading; a revised proposed order must be submitted in hard copy. [LRSF 14.6 A.] Petitioner still has not filed anything to support how this is the proper venue, when the trustee resides in Davis, California.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JANG 1991 TRUST (DATED 4/11/91) TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/6/20. Notice of the amendment to the accounting filed on 1/13/20 was mailed on 1/13/20 for the hearing on 2/4/20. Trusts require 30 days' notice. [CRC 7.53(a).] The declaration re the retention of original documents refers to the original financial statements required by LRSF 14.62 to be filed to verify an accounting.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOUIS ARMSTRONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/20. No earlier availability. An affidavit pursuant to Probate Code Section 13100 must be filed conventionally (and fully executed) in order for the Court to verify that a certified copy of the death certificate is attached. [LRSF 14.93 E.] Additionally, the amount set forth in paragraph 4 of the affidavit is not the current amount and paragraph 6 must show the value, not just "one-third interest." No courtesy copy of late filed papers (filed 3/11/20) have been received yet. Courtesy copies must be provided to the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/28/20. The revised, complete 13100 affidavit must be filed conventionally by no later than 4/28/20.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEOFFREY ALLEN DAHLHOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/07/2020. The assigned examiner made the following preliminary tentative ruling available to alert counsel, but nothing has been filed: The declaration (filed 03/06/2020) is a supplement to the final petition. As some information contained in the declaration does not appear to be particularly within the attorney's personal knowledge, the declaration must be verified by the petitioner. See CRC 7.104(b)(1). The hearing will be continued to 04/07/2020 unless a supplemental declaration signed by the petitioner is filed and a courtesy copy received by the assigned examiner by noon on 03/13/2020. The petitioner's supplemental declaration must identify the caption and filing date of the attorney's unverified declaration. See LRSF 14.18B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MACPRIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Title To And Require Trustee To Transfer Personal Property To Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/14/2020. Issues: 1) Petitioner provided page 1 of the petition you must provide a complete copy of the petition. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court no later than 04/07/2020 at 11am. (LRSF 2.7, 14.6). 2) A hard copy of the proposed order must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. (LRSF 14.93). [Proposed orders may not be e-filed.] 3) Petitioner did not file showing notice was given on the mandatory DE-115 form.
